---
name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: 提出新功能或改进建议 / Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 功能描述 / Feature Description
描述你想要的功能。/ Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## 使用场景 / Use Case
这个功能有什么用？能解决什么问题？/ Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## 建议方案 / Proposed Solution
如果你有实现思路，可以在这里描述。/ If you have an implementation idea, describe it here.

## 其他信息 / Additional Context
其他相关信息或截图。/ Any other information or screenshots.
